---
title: "Player embedding prelim 740 — notes"
format: html
---

# Setup

Two ablations vs the cleanup-740 baseline:

1. `baseline_extended_clean` — sanity replication, no embedding.
2. `with_player_embedding` — PRIMARY.

# Post-run analysis

To be filled after the full run completes.

```{python}
# import json
# m_b = json.load(open("metrics_baseline_extended_clean.json"))
# m_p = json.load(open("metrics_with_player_embedding.json"))
# print(f"baseline val_auc:  {m_b['val_auc']:.4f}")
# print(f"primary  val_auc:  {m_p['val_auc']:.4f}  (delta {m_p['val_auc'] - m_b['val_auc']:+.4f})")
```
